tools.name: slither-mcp
tools.notes: Local install at /Users/r00t/slither-mcp; previously missed. 23 MCP tools callable, 250 structured detector results (29 in-scope). Surfaced 1 extra in-scope finding vs. CLI slither: shadowing-local (MintBurnWrapper._owner shadows Ownable._owner) → SLS-1 Info.

tools.name: slither
tools.notes: Detector hits: 0 H / 2 M / 4 L / 22 Info. All triaged — see reports/skill-coverage/tob-fp-check.md

tools.name: semgrep
tools.command: semgrep --config r/solidity --sarif --metrics off --exclude lib --exclude test --exclude script --exclude src/legacy -o reports/semgrep.sarif .
tools.notes: 50 rules, 7 findings, all gas/style. Note: p/solidity and p/smart-contracts Semgrep registry packs return HTTP 404 at the time of this run; r/solidity is the current equivalent.

tools.name: aderyn
tools.notes: Aderyn 0.1.9 does not accept evm_version = prague; ran from /tmp/tel-v3-aderyn with that key patched to cancun. The aderyn binary panics AFTER writing the report (stderr shows 'called Result::unwrap() on an Err value') — report itself is complete.

tools.name: echidna
tools.notes: 10/10 properties pass; 500087 calls; 10080 unique instructions; corpus size 8; seed 6736041660536909558

tools.name: manticore
tools.notes: Manticore is not available on Python 3.13 / arm64 Darwin at the time of review. Halmos (preceding row) is the SMT-backed equivalent and covers the same class of properties; pyTEAL-style symbolic execution on EVM bytecode is also covered by Halmos. Replacement permitted by the non-negotiable rule that 'N/A because <reason>' is an acceptable outcome.

tools.name: amarna
tools.notes: Cairo/StarkNet static analyser; no Cairo contracts in scope (target is EVM Solidity).

tools.name: tealer
tools.notes: TEAL/Algorand static analyser; no TEAL contracts in scope.

tools.name: forge-build
tools.notes: All in-scope contracts compile; max runtime size 19454 B (TelcoinBridge) under 24576 B limit.

tools.name: forge-test
tools.command: forge test (with ETHEREUM_RPC_URL set for 2 forking tests)
tools.notes: 145 tests passed / 0 failed / 0 skipped (139 existing + 6 new invariant tests authored for this review)

tools.name: forge-coverage
tools.notes: 100% lines on all in-scope contracts; 96% stmts / 75% branches on TokenMigration (uncovered branch: renounceOwnership revert — covered by Halmos)

tools.name: forge-invariant
tools.notes: 6/6 invariants pass, 256 runs × depth 15 = 3840 handler calls
